
<html lang="en" class="dark">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
<title>A22 Production Toolkit — 5 Interactive Film-Production Tools</title>
<meta name="description" content="Five interactive film-production templates — timeline, budget, shooting plan, post-production and distribution. No login, no subscription, yours to keep.">
<style>
  :root{
    --bg:#ffffff; --surface:#f6f8fb; --surface2:#eef1f6; --text:#15151c; --muted:#5b6270;
    --border:#e6e8ee; --hero:#0b0b10;
    --blue:#0A84FF; --green:#30D158; --orange:#FF9F0A; --purple:#BF5AF2; --cyan:#5AC8FA;
  }
  html.dark{
    --bg:#0b0b10; --surface:#15151d; --surface2:#1c1c26; --text:#f4f5f8; --muted:#9aa2b4;
    --border:rgba(255,255,255,.10); --hero:#0b0b10;
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box}
  body{margin:0;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);
    font-family:ui-sans-serif,-apple-system,"Segoe UI",Roboto,Inter,system-ui,sans-serif;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;line-height:1.55;transition:background .3s,color .3s}
  .mono{font-family:ui-monospace,"SF Mono",Menlo,Consolas,monospace}
  .wrap{max-width:1080px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 22px}
  .muted{color:var(--muted)}
  .surface{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border)}
  a{color:inherit}
  .btn-buy{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;justify-content:center;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0A84FF,#BF5AF2);color:#fff;font-weight:700;
    padding:15px 26px;border-radius:13px;text-decoration:none;border:0;cursor:pointer;
    font-size:16px;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(10,132,255,.28);transition:transform .15s,box-shadow .15s}
  .btn-buy:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 14px 38px rgba(120,80,240,.36)}
  .btn-ghost{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:13px 20px;border-radius:12px;
    border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface);color:var(--text);text-decoration:none;font-weight:600}
  .pricepill{display:inline-flex;align-items:baseline;gap:8px;background:var(--surface);
    border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:999px;padding:8px 16px;font-weight:700}
  .kicker{font-size:12px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted)}
  .mark{width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:13px;display:block;object-fit:cover;border:1px solid var(--border)}
  .card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:18px;padding:22px}
  .tool{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:20px;height:100%}
  .accent-bar{height:4px;width:42px;border-radius:3px;margin-top:14px}
  .heroimg{width:100%;border-radius:18px;border:1px solid var(--border);display:block;
    box-shadow:0 30px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.35)}
  details{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:4px 18px;margin-bottom:10px}
  summary{cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;padding:14px 0;list-style:none;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
  summary::-webkit-details-marker{display:none}
  summary::after{content:"+";color:var(--muted);font-size:20px}
  details[open] summary::after{content:"–"}
  details p{margin:0 0 16px;color:var(--muted)}
  .reveal{transition:opacity .6s ease,transform .6s ease}
  html.js .reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(16px)}
  html.js .reveal.in{opacity:1;transform:none}
  a:focus-visible,button:focus-visible,summary:focus-visible{outline:3px solid var(--blue);outline-offset:3px;border-radius:8px}
  .sticky-buy{position:fixed;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;z-index:50;background:var(--surface);
    border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:11px 16px;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
    gap:12px;backdrop-filter:blur(12px)}
  .sticky-buy.show{display:flex}
  @media(max-width:760px){.sticky-buy.show{display:flex}}
  @media(min-width:761px){.sticky-buy{display:none!important}}
  @media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){html.js .reveal{transition:none;opacity:1;transform:none}.btn-buy{transition:none}}
  .grid{display:grid}
  .g2{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .g-tools{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .g3{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .g4{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  @media(min-width:640px){.g-tools{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.g4{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}
  @media(min-width:768px){.g2{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.g3{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr}}
  @media(min-width:1024px){.g-tools{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr}.g4{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr}}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- top bar -->
<header class="wrap" style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding-top:22px;padding-bottom:6px">
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px">
    <img class="mark" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="A22 logo" width="46" height="46">
    <span class="mono" style="font-size:13px;letter-spacing:1px">A22 Production Toolkit</span>
  </div>
  <button id="theme" class="btn-ghost" aria-label="Toggle light or dark mode" style="padding:9px 14px">
    <span id="theme-ico" aria-hidden="true">☀️</span><span>Theme</span>
  </button>
</header>

<main>
<!-- HERO -->
<section class="wrap" style="padding:46px 22px 30px">
  <div class="grid g2" style="gap:38px;align-items:center">
    <div class="reveal">
      <p class="kicker">Film Production Toolkit</p>
      <h1 style="font-size:clamp(34px,5vw,52px);line-height:1.05;margin:12px 0 14px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-1px">
        Plan, budget &amp; ship your film — without the spreadsheet chaos.</h1>
      <p class="muted" style="font-size:18px;margin:0 0 22px;max-width:46ch" data-gumroad-field="description">
        Five interactive tools that do the math for you. No login. No subscription. You own the files.</p>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:14px;align-items:center">
        <a class="btn-buy" data-gumroad-action="buy" href="https://filmprodigy0.gumroad.com/l/kqwjeo?wanted=true" aria-label="Buy the A22 Production Toolkit now">
          Get the kit — <span data-gumroad-field="price">€19</span></a>
        <a class="btn-ghost" href="#tools">See what's inside</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="reveal">
      <img class="heroimg" alt="Preview of the five A22 production templates: timeline, budget, shooting plan, post-production and distribution"
        src="data:image/jpeg;base64,">
    </div>
  </div>
  <ul class="mono muted" style="list-style:none;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px 24px;padding:24px 0 0;margin:0;font-size:13px">
    <li>✓ Works in any browser</li><li>✓ Saves your work offline</li><li>✓ Export &amp; back up</li><li>✓ Yours forever — no monthly fee</li>
  </ul>
</section>


<!-- TOOLS -->
<section id="tools" class="wrap" style="padding:34px 22px 14px">
  <p class="kicker reveal">What's inside</p>
  <h2 class="reveal" style="font-size:clamp(26px,4vw,36px);font-weight:800;margin:8px 0 26px;letter-spacing:-.5px">Five tools. One kit.</h2>
  <div class="grid g-tools" style="gap:16px">
    <div class="tool reveal"><svg viewBox="0 0 64 48" width="64" height="48" role="img" aria-label="Project Timeline icon"><rect x="6" y="10" width="30" height="7" rx="3" fill="#0A84FF"/><rect x="14" y="22" width="34" height="7" rx="3" fill="#0A84FF" opacity=".75"/><rect x="22" y="34" width="24" height="7" rx="3" fill="#0A84FF" opacity=".55"/></svg><h3 style="margin:14px 0 4px;font-size:18px">01 Project Timeline</h3><p class="muted" style="margin:0;font-size:14px">Drag-and-drop Gantt across all five phases.</p><div class="accent-bar" style="background:#0A84FF"></div></div><div class="tool reveal"><svg viewBox="0 0 64 48" width="64" height="48" role="img" aria-label="Budget Estimate icon"><rect x="8" y="26" width="8" height="16" rx="2" fill="#30D158"/><rect x="22" y="16" width="8" height="26" rx="2" fill="#30D158"/><rect x="36" y="22" width="8" height="20" rx="2" fill="#30D158"/><rect x="50" y="10" width="8" height="32" rx="2" fill="#30D158"/></svg><h3 style="margin:14px 0 4px;font-size:18px">02 Budget Estimate</h3><p class="muted" style="margin:0;font-size:14px">Line-item budget that sums itself as you type.</p><div class="accent-bar" style="background:#30D158"></div></div><div class="tool reveal"><svg viewBox="0 0 64 48" width="64" height="48" role="img" aria-label="Shooting Plan icon"><rect x="6" y="8" width="14" height="12" rx="2" fill="#FF9F0A"/><rect x="24" y="8" width="14" height="12" rx="2" fill="#FF9F0A" opacity=".4"/><rect x="6" y="26" width="14" height="12" rx="2" fill="#FF9F0A" opacity=".4"/><rect x="24" y="26" width="14" height="12" rx="2" fill="#FF9F0A"/><rect x="42" y="8" width="14" height="12" rx="2" fill="#FF9F0A" opacity=".4"/><rect x="42" y="26" width="14" height="12" rx="2" fill="#FF9F0A"/></svg><h3 style="margin:14px 0 4px;font-size:18px">03 Shooting Plan</h3><p class="muted" style="margin:0;font-size:14px">Scenes &amp; days with locations, timing and status.</p><div class="accent-bar" style="background:#FF9F0A"></div></div><div class="tool reveal"><svg viewBox="0 0 64 48" width="64" height="48" role="img" aria-label="Post-Production icon"><rect x="6" y="10" width="14" height="10" rx="3" fill="#BF5AF2"/><rect x="26" y="12" width="32" height="6" rx="3" fill="#BF5AF2" opacity=".4"/><rect x="6" y="28" width="14" height="10" rx="3" fill="#BF5AF2"/><rect x="26" y="30" width="26" height="6" rx="3" fill="#BF5AF2" opacity=".4"/></svg><h3 style="margin:14px 0 4px;font-size:18px">04 Post-Production</h3><p class="muted" style="margin:0;font-size:14px">Schedule the edit and track every deliverable.</p><div class="accent-bar" style="background:#BF5AF2"></div></div><div class="tool reveal"><svg viewBox="0 0 64 48" width="64" height="48" role="img" aria-label="Distribution icon"><circle cx="12" cy="24" r="6" fill="#5AC8FA"/><circle cx="32" cy="12" r="6" fill="#5AC8FA" opacity=".6"/><circle cx="32" cy="36" r="6" fill="#5AC8FA" opacity=".6"/><circle cx="52" cy="24" r="6" fill="#5AC8FA"/><path d="M16 22 L28 14 M16 26 L28 34 M36 14 L48 22 M36 34 L48 26" stroke="#5AC8FA" stroke-width="2" opacity=".5"/></svg><h3 style="margin:14px 0 4px;font-size:18px">05 Distribution</h3><p class="muted" style="margin:0;font-size:14px">Festival run, content calendar &amp; revenue map.</p><div class="accent-bar" style="background:#5AC8FA"></div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WHY DIFFERENT -->
<section class="wrap" style="padding:40px 22px">
  <div class="grid g3" style="gap:16px">
    <div class="card reveal"><h3 style="margin:0 0 8px;font-size:18px">Own it, don't rent it</h3>
      <p class="muted" style="margin:0">One file you keep, that works long after any subscription would've lapsed.</p></div>
    <div class="card reveal"><h3 style="margin:0 0 8px;font-size:18px">No login, no internet</h3>
      <p class="muted" style="margin:0">Open the files in any browser. Everything saves to your device — nothing is sent anywhere.</p></div>
    <div class="card reveal"><h3 style="margin:0 0 8px;font-size:18px">Built by a filmmaker</h3>
      <p class="muted" style="margin:0">Made on real shoots, for real shoots — the toolkit I wish someone had handed me three films ago.</p></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- HOW IT WORKS -->
<section class="wrap" style="padding:14px 22px 34px">
  <div class="card reveal">
    <p class="kicker">How it works</p>
    <div class="grid g4" style="gap:18px;margin-top:14px">
      <div><div class="mono" style="color:var(--blue);font-size:13px">01</div><b>Download &amp; open</b><p class="muted" style="margin:6px 0 0;font-size:14px">Five HTML files. Double-click — they open in any browser.</p></div>
      <div><div class="mono" style="color:var(--green);font-size:13px">02</div><b>Fill it in</b><p class="muted" style="margin:6px 0 0;font-size:14px">Type, pick from dropdowns, drag bars. Totals calculate live.</p></div>
      <div><div class="mono" style="color:var(--orange);font-size:13px">03</div><b>It auto-saves</b><p class="muted" style="margin:6px 0 0;font-size:14px">Close the tab and reopen — your project is right where you left it.</p></div>
      <div><div class="mono" style="color:var(--purple);font-size:13px">04</div><b>Export &amp; share</b><p class="muted" style="margin:6px 0 0;font-size:14px">Back up a project or print any tool to PDF for your team.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FAQ -->
<section class="wrap" style="padding:20px 22px 36px">
  <h2 class="reveal" style="font-size:clamp(22px,3.4vw,30px);font-weight:800;margin:0 0 18px">Questions</h2>
  <div class="reveal">
    <details><summary>Do I need an account or subscription?</summary><p>No. You download the files once and own them. No login, no monthly fee, nothing to cancel.</p></details>
    <details><summary>Does it work offline?</summary><p>Yes. Each tool is a single file that runs entirely in your browser — no internet required, and nothing is uploaded anywhere.</p></details>
    <details><summary>What do I actually receive?</summary><p>Five interactive HTML templates — Project Timeline, Budget Estimate, Shooting Plan, Post-Production schedule and Distribution plan — plus a short How-to-Use guide.</p></details>
    <details><summary>Can I use it for more than one film?</summary><p>Absolutely. Duplicate a file per project, or export your work and start fresh with the built-in "New" button.</p></details>
    <details><summary>Do I get updates?</summary><p>Yes — when a new version ships, you can re-download it from your library at no extra cost.</p></details>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FINAL CTA -->
<section id="buy" class="wrap" style="padding:24px 22px 90px">
  <div class="card reveal" style="text-align:center;padding:40px 22px">
    <p class="kicker">Ready when you are</p>
    <h2 style="font-size:clamp(26px,4vw,38px);font-weight:800;margin:10px 0 6px;letter-spacing:-.5px">Get the full production toolkit</h2>
    <p class="muted" style="margin:0 auto 20px;max-width:42ch">All five interactive tools, instant download, yours to keep.</p>
    <div class="pricepill" style="margin-bottom:18px"><span data-gumroad-field="price">€19</span><span class="muted mono" style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600">launch price</span></div>
    <div><a class="btn-buy" data-gumroad-action="buy" href="https://filmprodigy0.gumroad.com/l/kqwjeo?wanted=true" aria-label="Buy the A22 Production Toolkit now">Get the kit now</a></div>
    <p class="mono muted" style="font-size:12px;margin-top:16px">Secure checkout via Gumroad · instant download</p>
  </div>
</section>
</main>

<footer class="wrap" style="padding:24px 22px 40px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center">
  <span class="mono muted" style="font-size:12px">A22 FILMS · PRODUCTION TOOLKIT v1.0</span>
  <span class="mono muted" style="font-size:12px">a22films.com</span>
</footer>

<!-- sticky mobile buy -->
<div class="sticky-buy" id="stickybuy">
  <span class="pricepill" style="padding:6px 12px"><span data-gumroad-field="price">€19</span></span>
  <a class="btn-buy" style="padding:12px 18px;flex:1;max-width:60%" data-gumroad-action="buy" href="https://filmprodigy0.gumroad.com/l/kqwjeo?wanted=true" aria-label="Buy now">Get the kit</a>
</div>

<script>
(function(){
  document.documentElement.classList.add('js');
  // theme: respect system, allow toggle (persist if storage available)
  var root=document.documentElement, ico=document.getElementById('theme-ico');
  function setIco(){ ico.textContent = root.classList.contains('dark') ? '☀️' : '🌙'; }
  function prefersDark(){ try{ return window.matchMedia && matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches; }catch(e){ return true; } }
  try{ var s=localStorage.getItem('a22theme'); root.classList.toggle('dark', s? s==='dark' : prefersDark()); }
  catch(e){ root.classList.toggle('dark', prefersDark()); }
  setIco();
  document.getElementById('theme').addEventListener('click',function(){
    root.classList.toggle('dark'); setIco();
    try{ localStorage.setItem('a22theme', root.classList.contains('dark')?'dark':'light'); }catch(e){}
  });
  // scroll reveal
  var rev=document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  if('IntersectionObserver' in window){
    var io=new IntersectionObserver(function(es){es.forEach(function(en){if(en.isIntersecting){en.target.classList.add('in');io.unobserve(en.target);}});},{threshold:.12});
    rev.forEach(function(el){io.observe(el);});
  } else { rev.forEach(function(el){el.classList.add('in');}); }
  // sticky buy after hero
  var sb=document.getElementById('stickybuy'), hero=document.querySelector('main section');
  if('IntersectionObserver' in window && hero){
    var io2=new IntersectionObserver(function(es){es.forEach(function(en){ sb.classList.toggle('show', !en.isIntersecting); });});
    io2.observe(hero);
  }
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
